inputs.prompt: Project: Invisible Borders — a feature documentary following three undocumented migrant workers across Southern Europe over two years. Format: Feature documentary, 90 min. Funder: National Film Fund development programme (priorities: social impact, underrepresented voices, international relevance). Stage: Development complete, applying for production funding. Grant funds: Principal photography across 3 countries. Track record: Director's previous short screened at Berlinale Shorts.

Project: Sound Memories — audio documentary about dementia patients and music therapy. Format: 4-episode podcast series. Funder: Arts council (general cultural fund). Stage: Research phase. Grant funds: Recording equipment and production costs.

Project: The Last Classroom — documentary following rural schools in Norway facing closure due to depopulation. Format: 3 x 45 min documentary series. Funder: Nordisk Film & TV Fond (priorities: Nordic stories, co-production, cultural preservation). Stage: Development. Grant funds: Development research and shooting sizzle reel. Co-production: Norway/Sweden.
